mcp.instructions: Airtho SharePoint connector (read-only). Tools cover two domains: (1) Document libraries — job files, quotes, vendors, and other drives. Prefer the job-specific tools for job lookups; use browse/search/read for non-job drives or deep navigation. (2) SharePoint lists — structured data like RFI logs, submittals, change orders. Call list_lists first to discover available lists and column field_names. All tools accept human-readable names — no IDs needed.
